race.comment: YES I'M UGLY (4) stuck on well to finish second last start over 1350m at Ipswich, beaten one length. Beautifully placed against this line-up and is sure to give an excellent account despite the wide draw. BLACK 'N' DEADLY (7) made it back-to-back wins when successful last start over 1200m at Nanango, getting home by a neck. Goes up a rung or two but she is good enough to score again. ARAMINTA (3) drifted well back then came with a powerful run to finish 1.4 lengths from the winner in third when resuming last start over 1200m at Kilcoy. Strips fitter now and is expected to feature again. ROMANTIC BUBBLE (2) last appeared three weeks ago over 1000m at this track when he finished fifth. This is his first run for the David Peoples stable. Gets some weight off with the claim and is sure to make his presence felt.
